retry_reason: Failure indicates memory exhaustion (allocation failure), which may be transient if memory becomes available later; retrying the allocation could succeed if memory pressure eases.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to allocate three USB URBs and store them in the device struct; refcount management is implicit in the allocation/free functions (usb_alloc_urb sets initial refcount, usb_free_urb decrements and frees) but the function itself is a multi-urb allocation helper, not a refcount wrapper. The only non-refcount logic is the sequential allocation and error cleanup.
judge.retry_reason: Failure indicates memory exhaustion (allocation failure), which may be transient if memory becomes available later; retrying the allocation could succeed if memory pressure eases.

final.retry_reason: Failure indicates memory exhaustion (allocation failure), which may be transient if memory becomes available later; retrying the allocation could succeed if memory pressure eases.
